title: pckg packageKind tool standardization
body:
pckg server and dashboard treat **packageKind: tool** as a first-class registry profile (D-TOOL-PCKG-0004).

## Provenance
- **Repository:** `pckg`
- **Commit:** [`38648a4`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid_pckg/commit/38648a4)
- **Subject:** feat(server,ui,tests): packageKind tool standardization (D-TOOL-PCKG-0004)
- **Completed:** 2026-05-23

## Catalog scope
- **Delivery version:** v0.3 (Macros, concurrency, and stabilization)
- **Workstream:** `pckg-registry`
- **Deliverable:** `v03-pckg-tool-registry`

## Relation
Contributes to deliverable **Tool packageKind and registry integration** (`v03-pckg-tool-registry`).
